auto.description: Prompt-engineering orchestrator on Kimi K2.5 - manages wide context, selects agents, and engineers structured instructions. Routing and prompt engineering, not deep logic.

auto-fallback.description: Direct handler using Claude Opus 4.6 via GitHub Copilot - handles work directly when Go-model agents fail

planner.description: Brain (GLM-5) - Engineers precise, structured instruction blocks that eliminate ambiguity for muscle agents

reasoner.description: Brain (GLM-5) - Performs deep analysis and multi-step logic for complex architectural decisions

architect.description: Brain (GLM-5) - Designs robust system patterns and component interfaces

advocate.description: Brain (GLM-5) - Argues for optimal solutions with evidence-based reasoning in Discussion Protocol debates

critic.description: Brain (GLM-5) - Stress-tests proposals and identifies logical weaknesses in Discussion Protocol debates

auditor.description: Brain (GLM-5) - Analyzes code for quality, security, and performance standards

tester.description: Brain (GLM-5) - Designs comprehensive test strategies, edge-case coverage, and test specifications informed by industry best practices

executor.description: Muscle (Kimi K2.5) - Implements code changes based on high-quality specs provided by Brain agents

debugger.description: Muscle (Kimi K2.5) - Resolves standard bugs and syntactic issues efficiently

autoresearch.description: Muscle (Kimi K2.5) - Executes autonomous training loops and modifies ML experiment code on Apple Silicon/MPS

verifier.description: Operations (MiniMax M2.5) - Mechanically compares actual output against expected behavior

mapper.description: Operations (MiniMax M2.5) - Maps project structure and reads file organization

synthesizer.description: Operations (MiniMax M2.5) - Aggregates debate context and passes it back to the orchestrator

git-manager.description: Operations (MiniMax M2.5) - Routine git operations and branch management
